changes.description: Converted Python pseudocode to JavaScript for bare runtime compatibility. Added explicit output format requirements, verification checklists, and 'stdout-only script' pattern to prevent floating-point imprecision in output files.

Added critical per-unit conversion instructions (S_BASE=100 MVA) for DC power flow. Model was computing angles in MW units instead of radians, causing angles >1.0 radian. Added explicit warning about per-unit conversion with diagnostic hint.

known_issues.economic-dispatch_within-limits: Task definition bug: testPattern 'within limits' does not match test name 'all generators within min/max limits' (intervening 'min/max' text). The within-limits criterion always scores 0, capping economic-dispatch at 80/100. The model's dispatch values are correct and pass when tested manually.
